rationale: TPLO is a recognized surgical technique for feline cruciate ligament disease, though far less common than in dogs
Advanced cardiac imaging is performed on avian and large reptile patients by exotic-animal specialists
source: Association of Avian Veterinarians; Journal of Herpetological Medicine

rationale: Chemotherapy protocols exist for avian and reptile oncology at specialized exotic-animal centers
Reptiles safely receive injectable and inhalant anesthesia with appropriate monitoring
